stories.title: DB schema: users, roles, parks, park_user pivot

deviations.description: Additional migrations added beyond spec: login_attempts tracking (2024_01_14), two_factor fields (2024_01_15), and personal_access_tokens created as a separate later migration (2026_03_07) rather than in the initial schema set.

stories.title: DB schema: unit types, units, unit features, unit photos
DB schema: customers, blacklist, customer documents

deviations.description: Customer PII fields (first_name, last_name, email, phone, dob, id_number) are encrypted at rest using a custom EncryptedString cast (added via 2026_03_09_100000 migration). An email_hash column was also added for searching without decrypting (2026_03_09_100001). A dunning_pause field was added to the customers table (2026_03_08_000003). These are beyond the spec's schema definition.

stories.title: DB schema: applications, waiting list, waiting list notifications
DB schema: contracts, contract signatures, contract renewals

deviations.description: contracts table extended with final_invoice_waived (boolean) and is_termination_inspection (on damage_reports) via 2026_03_09_000003_add_termination_fields migration. billing_month column added to invoices via separate migration (2026_03_09_000001).

stories.title: DB schema: deposits
DB schema: invoices, invoice items, payments, dunning

deviations.description: invoice_items.item_type enum extended with 'credit_note' type via 2026_03_08_000001 migration (beyond spec's listed enum values). payments.retry_count column added via 2026_03_08_000002 migration. invoices.billing_month column added via 2026_03_09_000001 for idempotency. electricity_readings.invoice_id foreign key added via 2026_03_09_000002.

stories.title: DB schema: damage reports, damage photos, vendors

deviations.description: damage_reports table extended with is_termination_inspection boolean column (via 2026_03_09_000003) to support the termination inspection workflow. Not in original spec.

stories.title: DB schema: electricity meters, readings, pricing

deviations.description: electricity_readings.invoice_id foreign key column added (via 2026_03_09_000002) to track which readings have been billed. Not in original spec.

stories.title: DB schema: tasks, notifications, audit log
DB schema: mail templates, sent mail log, document templates
DB schema: discount rules, insurance options, revenue targets, system settings

deviations.description: data_retention_years system setting added via separate migration (2026_03_09_000006) to support GDPR retention policy. Performance indexes migration (2026_03_09_000005) added beyond spec.

stories.title: DB schema: reference items, employees
Laravel auth API: login, logout, refresh, password reset

deviations.description: GET /api/v1/auth/me endpoint added (not in spec). POST /api/v1/auth/change-password endpoint added. All routes prefixed with /v1. ThrottleRequests applied (10/min login, 5/min password reset). block-2fa-tokens custom middleware applied to authenticated routes.

stories.title: Auth: Two-factor authentication (TOTP) API
RBAC middleware and park-scoping middleware

deviations.description: Additional middleware implemented beyond spec: Block2faTokens (prevents using 2FA temp tokens on full API), SecurityHeaders (X-Frame-Options, CSP, etc.), AdminDocsAccess (protects API documentation). ParkScopeMiddleware exists but park scoping is also handled inline in controllers.

stories.title: Admin: User and employee management API

deviations.description: GET /api/v1/admin/employees/{id} (show single employee) added beyond spec which only lists GET/POST/PUT/DELETE. Employee show endpoint is an extra read.

stories.title: Park management API (CRUD, logo upload, settings)

deviations.description: FileServeController added with signed URL file serving via web routes (not in spec). Files served via signed temporary URLs rather than direct S3 URLs, providing an extra access control layer.

stories.title: Unit types API (CRUD, floor plans, features)
Units API (CRUD, status transitions, photos, rental history)
Discount rules and insurance options API
Customer API (CRUD, document upload, GDPR delete, blacklist)

deviations.description: GET /api/v1/customers/{id}/data-export endpoint added for GDPR subject access request (implemented under admin role guard). This goes beyond the basic spec for this story (though it aligns with US-089 requirements — it was implemented in CustomerController rather than a separate controller).

stories.title: Application workflow API (CRUD, status, assign, credit check, convert)
Waiting list API (CRUD, notify, convert to application)

deviations.description: GET /api/v1/waiting-list (global index, not park-scoped) added beyond spec. NotifyWaitingListEntries job triggered not only when unit status changes to free, but also when a termination inspection damage report is resolved — a more complete implementation than specified.

stories.title: Contract API (generate PDF, e-sign flow, activate, terminate, renew)

deviations.description: ContractService extracted as a dedicated service class handling termination logic, final invoice creation (pro-rated), and unit status transitions. contract.final_invoice_waived field added to allow deposit return even when final invoice unpaid. is_termination_inspection flag on linked damage report triggers unit→free transition when resolved.

stories.title: Deposit management API (track, process return, Mollie payout)

deviations.description: Deposit return is blocked if final invoice is unpaid unless final_invoice_waived=true — this is stricter than the spec's 'can only return if contract terminated' validation. Provides more rigorous financial safeguard.

stories.title: PDF generation service (contracts, invoices, documents)
Invoice generation API (monthly auto-generate, manual, DATEV export)

deviations.description: billing_month column added to invoices table for idempotency tracking. Idempotency check in GenerateInvoiceJob prevents duplicate invoices for same contract+month. InvoiceService extracted as separate service class. electricity_readings.invoice_id tracked to prevent double-billing electricity.

stories.title: Mollie payment API (payment links, webhooks, refunds, retries)

deviations.description: payments.retry_count column added to track retry attempts per payment record. Mollie webhook verifies X-Mollie-Signature header. Retry logic implemented via RetryPayment queued job. Mollie integration is a stub (sandbox URLs) not a live integration, but architecture is complete.

stories.title: Dunning automation: scheduler, escalation, dunning API

deviations.description: DunningService extracted as dedicated service class. customers.dunning_pause boolean column added (2026_03_08_000003) to support pause functionality. DunningService encapsulates escalation logic, fee calculation, and email sending.

stories.title: Damage reports API (CRUD, status, photos, vendor assignment, damage invoice)

deviations.description: damage_reports.is_termination_inspection boolean added to enable automatic unit→free transition and waiting list notification when termination inspection is resolved. GET /api/v1/damage-reports/{id} (show single) added beyond spec.

stories.title: Electricity metering API (meters CRUD, readings, billing charge)

deviations.description: PUT /api/v1/meters/{id} and DELETE /api/v1/meters/{id} endpoints added beyond spec (spec only listed GET/POST/PUT/DELETE under /api/units/{unitId}/meters). electricity_readings.invoice_id tracked to prevent double-billing a reading.

stories.title: Vendor management API (CRUD, vendor invoices)

deviations.description: GET /api/v1/vendors/{id} (show single vendor) added. PUT /api/v1/vendors/{id}/invoices/{invoiceId} (update vendor invoice) added. These are beyond the spec's listed endpoints.

stories.title: Task management API (CRUD, status, assignment, related entities)
Mail system API (templates CRUD, send individual, mass mailing, schedule)

deviations.description: POST /api/v1/mail/recipient-count endpoint added to allow the UI to show estimated recipient count before sending (used in mass mail compose UI). Not in spec.

stories.title: Document templates API and system settings API

deviations.description: POST /api/v1/document-templates/{id}/preview endpoint added for generating a sample PDF preview from a template. Not in spec.

stories.title: Reference items API and LLM access codes API
In-app notification API and global search API
Dashboard KPI and reports API

deviations.description: GET /api/v1/reports/contracts endpoint added (not in spec's listed report endpoints). Reports accessible to broader role set (rental_manager, office_worker, customer_service) not just admin/main_manager as implied by spec.

stories.title: Revenue targets API
Audit log viewer API
Vue.js SPA scaffold: project init, router, Pinia stores, axios client, layout shell

deviations.description: Laravel Reverb WebSocket broadcasting configured (Broadcast::routes in api.php, laravel-echo in frontend plugins). Adds real-time capability beyond spec's basic SPA scaffold. useFormErrors composable added for standardized 422 validation handling.

stories.title: Shared UI component library: buttons, badges, table, modal, form inputs, pagination

deviations.description: AppSkeleton.vue and AppEmptyState.vue included in the component library (these are specified in US-083, but implemented alongside shared components). WorkroomMenu.vue also in /components. All components are present and typed.

stories.title: Login page, password reset page, 2FA verify page
Dashboard page UI (KPI cards, Mahnstuffe table, invoices table, revenue table, Kanban, calendar)
Applications list page UI
Application detail page UI
Waiting list page UI
Customer list page UI
Customer profile page UI
Blacklist management page UI
Units list page UI (card and table view)
Unit detail page UI (info, photos, history, electricity, damage)
Contracts list page UI
Contract detail page UI (full lifecycle actions)
Deposit return workflow UI
Finance: Invoices list and invoice detail UI
Finance: Debtors and dunning management UI
Finance: Payments list and vendor invoices UI

deviations.description: Vendor management UI (/finance/vendors) is implemented as a separate view at /operations/vendors (VendorsView.vue under operations/) rather than under /finance/vendors as specified. The finance payments page exists but vendor invoices are accessed from the operations module.

stories.title: Damage reports list and detail UI

deviations.description: Damage reports are placed at /operations/damage-reports (DamageReportsView.vue, DamageReportDetailView.vue) rather than /units/damage and /units/damage/{id} as specified in the acceptance criteria.

stories.title: Task board UI (full Kanban with drag-and-drop)

deviations.description: Drag-and-drop implemented using native HTML5 drag events (dragstart/dragover/drop) rather than vue-draggable or @vueuse/gesture as specified. Functionally equivalent. Tasks placed at /operations/tasks (TasksView.vue) which slightly differs from the spec's /workroom/tasks path.

stories.title: Park profile management UI

deviations.description: Park profile management is split: ParksView.vue is under /admin/parks (for admin). The spec expects /park/location accessible to Main Manager with logo upload, primary color picker, and LLM access codes section. The admin Parks view covers CRUD but may not expose all the per-park configuration fields (primary_color picker, LLM codes) in the same single page as specified.

stories.title: Park unit types, floor plans, and insurance options UI

deviations.description: Unit types UI is at /units/unit-types (UnitTypesView.vue) rather than /park/types as specified. Insurance options are accessible from within the unit types view rather than at a separate /park/types/{id}/insurance path.

stories.title: Park discount rules and revenue targets UI

deviations.description: Discount rules UI is at /finance/discount-rules (DiscountRulesView.vue) rather than /park/discounts as specified. Revenue targets are at /finance/revenue-targets (RevenueTargetsView.vue) rather than /park/revenue-targets as specified.

stories.title: Park electricity configuration UI

deviations.description: Electricity configuration UI is at /operations/electricity (ElectricityView.vue) rather than /park/electricity as specified. Functionally the pricing history, new pricing, and units overview are present but the URL structure deviates.

stories.title: Vendor management UI

deviations.description: Vendor management UI is at /operations/vendors (VendorsView.vue) rather than /park/vendors as specified. Functionally covers vendor CRUD and vendor invoices.

stories.title: Mail templates management UI

deviations.description: TipTap WYSIWYG editor integrated (as specified, 'TipTap or Quill' — TipTap chosen). Mail templates UI is at /mail/mail-templates (MailTemplatesView.vue). A separate MailView.vue also exists. This matches spec routing of /settings/mail-templates conceptually.

stories.title: Mass mailing and sent mail log UI

deviations.description: POST /api/v1/mail/recipient-count endpoint added and integrated in MailComposeView.vue to show live recipient count estimate before sending. Not in original spec for this story.

stories.title: Document templates management UI
System settings UI
Admin: Users and employees management UI

deviations.description: AdminUsersView.vue and AdminEmployeesView.vue are separated into distinct view files (admin/AdminUsersView.vue, admin/AdminEmployeesView.vue) rather than a single combined admin page. There is also a legacy admin/UsersView.vue present. The separation provides cleaner navigation.

stories.title: Admin: Reference data management UI
User profile and account settings UI (change password, 2FA setup)

deviations.description: Notification preferences toggle section is present in ProfileView.vue and calls PUT /auth/notification-preferences, but no corresponding backend route exists in api.php — the API endpoint is not implemented, making this feature non-functional.

stories.title: In-app notification center UI (bell dropdown + full page)

deviations.description: Laravel Reverb WebSocket broadcasting configured in addition to polling (60s interval in notifications store). This provides real-time notification delivery beyond the spec's 'polled every 60s or via SSE' requirement.

stories.title: Global search UI
Workroom quick-create menu UI

deviations.description: Keyboard shortcuts for Workroom (N+A, N+S, etc.) are documented in the component's title attribute and keyboard listener is registered, but the actual shortcut handler logic only uses Ctrl/Cmd+K for search (in AppTopBar). The WorkroomMenu's keydown handler exists but the shortcut combination logic for N+A/N+S/etc. needs verification against spec.

stories.title: Reports UI: Applications and Customers tabs
Reports UI: Units and Finance tabs
Reports UI: Audit log viewer tab
Application reports list page and waiting list reports
Customer reports and units damage reports pages
Finance reports and vendor cost reports
Error pages, loading states, and empty states
Mobile responsive adjustments
E2E integration: monthly invoice generation scheduled job

deviations.description: Idempotency implemented via billing_month column on invoices table — more robust than a simple duplicate check. electricity_readings.invoice_id tracked to include unbilled electricity in monthly invoices. Laravel Horizon integrated for queue worker monitoring and job retry management.

stories.title: E2E integration: contract termination → final invoice → deposit return flow

deviations.description: Pro-rated final invoice correctly calculated in ContractService. is_termination_inspection flag on damage reports enables automatic unit→free + waiting list notify when inspection resolves. final_invoice_waived field allows explicit override of deposit return block. These are more complete implementations than the spec's acceptance criteria describe.

stories.title: Performance: API response caching and query optimization

deviations.description: Performance indexes migration (2026_03_09_000005) adds indexes beyond those specified: also covers contracts(park_id, status), payments(invoice_id, status), dunning_records(customer_id), waiting_list(park_id, unit_type_id). More comprehensive than spec.

stories.title: Security hardening: CSRF, rate limiting, input sanitization, file validation

deviations.description: HTMLPurifier is not listed in composer.json and no HTMLPurifier usage was found in the codebase. The spec requires user-supplied HTML (mail template body) to be sanitized with HTMLPurifier before storage. TipTap editor output is stored without server-side HTML sanitization.

SecurityHeaders middleware added providing X-Frame-Options, Content-Security-Policy, and other security headers not in the spec. AdminDocsAccess middleware protects API documentation. Rate limiting applied with named throttle groups (api-read, api-write) beyond the spec's basic login throttle.

stories.title: GDPR compliance: consent flow, deletion, data export

deviations.description: PII fields encrypted at rest using custom EncryptedString cast (first_name, last_name, email, phone, dob, id_number) — exceeds spec which only requires anonymization on GDPR delete. email_hash column added for searchability without decryption. data_retention_years system setting added via dedicated migration.

stories.title: Seeder: demo data for all modules

deviations.description: DatabaseSeeder.php only calls DemoSeeder — there is no separate DemoSeeder for CI as a 'minimal data set for tests' (spec: 'Separate DemoSeeder for CI: minimal data set for tests'). DemoSeeder is used for both full demo and CI purposes. Seed data counts match spec (1 admin, 2 parks, 3 unit types per park, 20 units per park, 15 customers, 10 active contracts, 5 terminated, 20 invoices, 5 dunning records, 3 damage reports, 10 tasks).

stories.title: Docker and deployment configuration
API documentation (OpenAPI / Swagger)

deviations.description: Scramble (dedoc/scramble) used instead of l5-swagger. API docs accessible at /docs/api (Scramble's default) with a redirect from /api/documentation to /docs/api. Scramble uses reflection-based generation rather than code annotations — this is a valid alternative but differs from the spec's 'l5-swagger or Scramble' with annotations approach. AdminDocsAccess middleware protects the docs endpoint.
